title: Integration of existing Google ADs account / campaigns into monday.com board
excerpt: Hi, when setting up the Google Ads Management template, everything works good, obviously monday gets connected to the correct Google Ads account, but it doesnt integrate any of the existing campaigns. Clicking the "accou…

posts.author: schaeferchen (Stefan Schäfer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, when setting up the Google Ads Management template, everything works good, obviously monday gets connected to the correct Google Ads account, but it doesnt integrate any of the existing campaigns. Clicking the "account" button, I see that Im connected correct, but non of any campaign groups get filled.
I found similar problems within community, but didn`t see any solution yet. If anyboday knows, please support.

posts.author: KerenSudri (Keren Sudri)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Keren from monday’s tech partnership who created the app, there was a bug for several account who couldn’t sync their campigns, the bug was solved a week ago feel free to reach out to me for additional support and feedback on the new app! Kerensu@monday.com
